variants.title: Mann Filter W 950/17 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550695
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 950/17 Oil Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550695
variants.description: MANN-FILTER oil filters: Top filtration performance and optimal cleaning protect the engine against wear caused by impurities and combustion residues in the oil. Filter media and high-quality sealing materials that are individually tailored to the intended application offer optimum protection over the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Oil Filter, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 63.0 mm, Dimension C: 72.0 mm, Dimension G: 1-12 UNF-1B, Dimension H: 171.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.6 bar, No. Anti-Drain Back Valves: 1, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 26µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 94.7 mm, Length: 173.5 mm, Thread: 1-12 UN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.4 BAR

variants.title: Donaldson P550695 Hydraulic Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550695 Hydraulic Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Spin-On, Efficiency 1: 26µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 94.7 mm, Length: 173.5 mm, Thread: 1-12 UN, Bypass Pressure: 1.4 BAR bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 26µ @ β2, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.4 BAR

variants.title: Fleetguard HF6206 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P550695
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF6206 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P550695
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF6206 premium hydraulic spin-on filter with cellulose media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Spin-On, Efficiency 1: 26µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 94.7 mm, Length: 173.5 mm, Thread: 1-12 UN, Bypass Pressure: 1.4 BAR bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 26µ @ β2, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.4 BAR
